description: Hag-cursed beings marked by eldritch bargains, with living tokens embedded in their transformed flesh.
subraces: Survivors of a hag's ritual bearing crown-like horns and an eerie, fey-lit gaze.
Victims of wild fey magic, warped by uncontrolled enchantments seeping from their skin.
Children raised by hags, absorbing dark magic in the cradle and carrying it in their blood.
